seo.title: Hiver Alternatives for E-commerce: Find the Best Helpdesk Solution
seo.description: Looking for a Hiver alternative that's built for e-commerce? Compare features, pricing, and e-commerce focus to find the perfect helpdesk for your onlin...

content.intro: Hiver is a popular shared inbox and helpdesk solution tightly integrated with Gmail. While it offers a way to manage customer support within Gmail, its limitations, particularly for e-commerce businesses needing order context and advanced automation, often lead teams to seek alternatives.
why_look_for_alternatives: **Limited E-commerce Functionality:** Hiver lacks native e-commerce integrations. For Shopify, Magento, or WooCommerce stores, this means manually pulling order details to understand customer inquiries, slowing down response times and frustrating customers.

**Gmail Dependency:** Being deeply tied to Gmail can be restrictive. If your team wants to expand to other channels like live chat or integrate with non-Google services, Hiver's Gmail-centric design becomes a bottleneck.

**Basic Automation:** Hiver offers some automation features, but it falls short of the AI-powered solutions offered by alternatives. This makes it difficult to automatically resolve common issues, personalize responses, and scale support efficiently.

**Scaling Challenges:** As your e-commerce business grows, Hiver's add-on approach to features and channels can lead to a fragmented and expensive solution. You might find yourself needing multiple add-ons to achieve the functionality that's included in other all-in-one platforms.

alternatives.name: Replyma
alternatives.tagline: AI-powered customer support built for e-commerce.
alternatives.description: Replyma is an AI-first customer support platform designed specifically for e-commerce businesses. It integrates seamlessly with popular e-commerce platforms like Shopify, Magento, and WooCommerce, providing instant access to order details, shipping information, and customer history directly within the inbox. Replyma's AI automatically resolves tickets, personalizes responses, and provides agents with real-time support suggestions, leading to faster resolution times and happier customers. It works with email and chat.
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce businesses looking for AI-powered automation and deep e-commerce integration.
pros: Deep e-commerce integration with order context in inbox
Unified inbox for email and chat
cons: Newer platform compared to established players
Focus primarily on e-commerce may not suit all businesses

alternatives.name: Gorgias
alternatives.tagline: The leading customer service platform for e-commerce.
alternatives.description: Gorgias is a popular helpdesk solution designed specifically for e-commerce businesses, particularly those using Shopify, Magento, and BigCommerce. It provides a centralized platform for managing customer inquiries from various channels, including email, live chat, social media, and phone. Gorgias offers features like order information integration, automation rules, and pre-built integrations with popular e-commerce apps.
alternatives.best_for: High-volume e-commerce stores needing robust integrations and automation.
cons: Can be expensive for small teams

alternatives.name: Zendesk
alternatives.description: Zendesk is a comprehensive customer service platform suitable for a wide range of businesses, including e-commerce. It offers a broad suite of features, including ticketing, live chat, knowledge base, and community forums. Zendesk's flexibility and scalability make it a popular choice for larger organizations with complex support needs.
alternatives.best_for: Large organizations needing a highly customizable and scalable solution.
pros: Wide range of features and integrations
cons: Can be overwhelming for small teams

alternatives.name: Tidio
alternatives.tagline: All-in-one customer service platform with live chat and chatbots.
alternatives.description: Tidio is a customer service platform that combines live chat, chatbots, and email marketing automation. It's designed to help businesses engage with customers in real-time, automate support tasks, and generate leads. Tidio is particularly well-suited for small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses looking for an affordable and easy-to-use solution.
alternatives.best_for: Small to medium-sized e-commerce businesses needing live chat and chatbot functionality.
alternatives.pricing: Free plan available; paid plans starting at $29/month

alternatives.name: Help Scout
alternatives.tagline: Help desk software for growing businesses.
alternatives.description: Help Scout is a customer support platform designed to provide a personalized and human-like support experience. It offers features like shared inboxes, knowledge base, and live chat. Help Scout is a good option for businesses that prioritize customer relationships and want to avoid the complexities of more enterprise-level solutions.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses that prioritize personalized customer support and ease of use.
pros: Good for small to medium-sized teams

alternatives.name: Freshdesk
alternatives.tagline: Customer support software for businesses of all sizes.
alternatives.description: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support platform that offers a wide range of features, including ticketing, knowledge base, live chat, and social media integration. It's a versatile solution suitable for businesses of all sizes and industries, including e-commerce.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing a comprehensive and customizable helpdesk solution.
alternatives.pricing: Free plan available; paid plans starting at $15/agent/month
cons: Can be complex to set up and configure

alternatives.name: Front
alternatives.description: Front is a shared inbox platform designed to improve team communication and collaboration. While not specifically built for e-commerce, it can be used to manage customer inquiries from various channels, including email, SMS, and social media. Front is a good option for teams that need to collaborate on customer support and other types of communication.
alternatives.best_for: Teams needing a collaborative shared inbox for various communication channels.
cons: Can be expensive for large teams

alternatives.name: Zoho Desk
alternatives.tagline: Customer service software to delight your customers.
alternatives.description: Zoho Desk is a customer service platform that's part of the Zoho suite of business applications. It offers features like ticketing, knowledge base, live chat, and social media integration. Zoho Desk is a good option for businesses that already use other Zoho products and want a tightly integrated customer service solution.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses already using the Zoho ecosystem.
alternatives.pricing: Free plan available; paid plans starting at $14/agent/month
cons: Can be complex to set up and configure

alternatives.name: Kustomer
alternatives.description: Kustomer (now a part of Meta) is a CRM platform designed specifically for customer service. It provides a unified view of the customer journey, allowing agents to personalize interactions and provide more effective support. Kustomer is a good option for businesses that want to leverage customer data to improve the customer experience.
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing a CRM-focused customer service solution.

alternatives.name: Reamaze
alternatives.tagline: Helpdesk and live chat for e-commerce.
alternatives.description: Reamaze is a customer service platform that focuses on e-commerce businesses. It offers features like live chat, email marketing integrations, and order management. Reamaze is another strong contender specifically for e-commerce, similar to Gorgias and Replyma.
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce businesses looking for live chat and email marketing integrations.
pros: Live chat and email marketing integrations
cons: Can be expensive for small teams
Might not be suitable for businesses outside of e-commerce

faq.question: What are the key differences between Hiver and Replyma?
faq.answer: Hiver is a Gmail-centric shared inbox, while Replyma is an AI-powered customer support platform built specifically for e-commerce. Replyma offers deeper e-commerce integrations, AI-powered ticket resolution, and a unified inbox for email and chat, features not natively available in Hiver.

faq.question: Is Replyma a good fit for small e-commerce businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, Replyma is designed to scale with your business. Its AI-powered automation helps small teams handle a large volume of inquiries efficiently. The order context and pre-built e-commerce integrations streamline workflows, allowing small teams to provide exceptional customer support without needing a large support staff.

faq.question: Does Replyma integrate with Shopify?
faq.answer: Yes, Replyma offers a direct integration with Shopify, providing access to order details, customer information, and shipping status directly within the inbox. This eliminates the need to switch between platforms and allows agents to resolve issues faster.

faq.question: How does Replyma's AI help with customer support?
faq.answer: Replyma's AI automatically resolves common customer inquiries, such as order status updates, shipping information, and return requests. It also provides agents with real-time support suggestions, helping them personalize responses and resolve issues more effectively. The AI learns from past interactions to continuously improve its performance.

faq.question: What if I need features beyond what Replyma offers?
faq.answer: Replyma integrates with a variety of popular e-commerce apps and tools. If you need specific functionality that's not natively available, you can likely find an integration to meet your needs. Plus, the Replyma team is constantly working on new features and integrations based on customer feedback.

content.cta_text: Ready to see how Replyma can transform your e-commerce customer support? Start your free trial today!
